# Himsols

> Verified tree plantation, waste management, and rural marketplace for Himachal Pradesh — sponsor trees, track impact, support farmers.

Himsols connects climate-conscious individuals and companies with verified plantations on farmer land in Himachal Pradesh. We provide geo-tagged plantation proof, survival tracking, carbon impact reports, and a rural marketplace for farmer produce and handmade goods.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Plant trees, support rural communities, track your impact.
- [About Himsols](/about): Who we are, our mission, and team.
- [Tree Plantation](/tree-plantation): Book verified tree plantation services.
- [Plant a Single Tree — ₹299](/single-tree-pack): Sponsor one tree with geo-tag proof.
- [Climate Impact Pack — ₹2,999](/climate-impact-pack): Sponsor 10 trees with full impact report.
- [Shop Trees](/shop): Browse our full catalogue of trees by species.
- [Plants Catalogue](/plants): Ornamental and native plant varieties.
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Farmer produce and handmade goods from rural Himachal.
- [Gift Cards](/gift-cards): Green gift cards for any occasion.
- [Campaigns](/campaigns): Active fundraisers and plantation drives.
- [Corporate / CSR](/corporate): B2B plantation, carbon offset, and CSR programs.
- [CSR Carbon Offset](/csr-carbon-offset): Carbon offset reporting for companies.
- [Schools Program](/schools): Sustainability workshops and plantation drives for schools.
- [Waste Management](/waste-management): Doorstep scrap pickup across Himachal.
- [Partner with Us](/partner-with-us): Become a land or distribution partner.
- [Farmer Registration](/farmer-registration): Register your land for verified plantation.
- [Live Impact Dashboard](/impact): Platform-wide trees planted and CO2 estimates.
- [Green Quiz](/green-quiz): Estimate your carbon footprint.
- [Blog](/blog): Stories on agroforestry, carbon, and climate action.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Photos from plantation drives and field visits.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach our team.

## Optional
- [Services Overview](/services): Service summary page.

- [Privacy Policy](/privacy)
